scope: Commit-path strict/advisory split regression gate (#486). Imperative driver runs leader-feedback-aggregate.sh --summarize (the every-commit `sst3-metrics-feedback-drift` hook entrypoint) against 3 isolated temp corpora via the SST3_FEEDBACK_DIR test seam: (A) clean in-scope -> exit 0; (B) + a broken in-scope feedback file -> exit != 0 (AC5: hard parse failure BLOCKS the commit — pre-#486 --summarize was 0, the silent-rot bug); (C) clean + a non-conforming-filename file -> exit 0 + stderr WARNING (AC7: a misfiled non-telemetry file must not wedge the gate). Catches drift if a future edit reverts --summarize to bare regenerate_index (mtime-short-circuit silent-rot) or makes a non-conforming filename hard-block.
stdout_must_contain: PASS: scenario C non-conforming-filename --summarize exit 0 + WARNING (AC7)
